subject: A young male-presenting humanoid fighter in layered fighting attire — a Monk job-class character from Final Fantasy XIV
description: A young humanoid figure in a ready, crouching stance with fists raised. The figure wears layered fighting attire: dark and white cloth panels, fingerless armored gauntlets, an open-chest wrap, and a bright red sash at the waist. An amulet or pendant hangs at the chest. The pose is assertive — weight forward, arms bent in a fighting guard. The background is minimal, fading to a pale neutral gradient. Card type is 'Backup / Standard Unit' from FFXIV. No specific named character is indicated — this appears to be a generic job-class illustration.
foreground: Fighter in crouching guard stance with gauntlets and red sash
emotion: focused, combative — guard stance, intense expression
